multi_step: solving likely requires reading one or more key points from the titration graph and mapping them to acid-base titration concepts
for carbonic acid, identifying the first dissociation constant typically involves locating the relevant equivalence/half-equivalence region and relating pH to pKa, then converting to Ka magnitude
multiple-choice options reduce open-ended complexity somewhat, so the reasoning burden is moderate rather than extreme
verifiability: answer is constrained by 4 multiple-choice options
registry_passed=true, so core assets are available for downstream checking
